title: spermacoce haenkeana
intro: Spermacoce haenkeana, also known as Haenke's Spermacoce or Haenke's threadweed, is a flowering plant in the Rubiaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Spermacoce haenkeana include the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic for wounds and skin infections. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
